title: WA LexisNexis Master Contract - Participating Agencies

communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Washington Public Records Act, I hereby request the following records:

1. All records identifying government entities, agencies, municipalities, or authorized purchasers that have purchased goods or services through WA State Master Contract No. 00220 (LexisNexis Risk Solutions FL Inc., Category 3: Nationwide Public Records Search), including any Master Contract Sales Reports submitted by LexisNexis Risk Solutions FL Inc. to Enterprise Services.

2. Any purchase orders, participating addenda, or order forms issued under Master Contract No. 00220 by law enforcement agencies, sheriff's offices, police departments, or criminal justice agencies, for the period July 1, 2022 through the date this request is processed.

3. The pricing exhibit (Exhibit B) and any amendments to the LexisNexis Risk Solutions FL Inc. portion of Master Contract No. 00220.

Context: We are looking for Washington State agencies that are contributing data to LexisNexis's PSDEX (public safety data exchange) or AVCC (Accurint virtual crime center).

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 5 business days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

Shawn Segal
